name: AI Sales Web Researcher
description: Takes a company name, uses Exa for web search and Firecrawl for deep scraping of company pages, Claude AI builds comprehensive sales intelligence including company overview, key contacts, pain points, and talking points, then saves the intel to Google Sheets.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for deep scraping

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving intel

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID to save sales research

steps.name: Build research queries for the company
Search Exa for recent company news
Extract top company URL for deep scraping
Deep scrape company website with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for sales intelligence
Run Claude AI sales intelligence analysis
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Save sales intel to Google Sheets
